content: Echo/false barge-in: browser AEC3 (getUserMedia echoCancellation:true) is the free defense but needs 2-5s to adapt after stream start — delay transmitting mic audio briefly. Speakerphone loops bot audio into mic; if bot audio is played via WebAudio instead of an <audio>/RTC sink the AEC reference signal is missing and echo cancellation fails. Bot hearing itself causes self-interruption loops. Do not disable echoCancellation constraint; test speakerphone-on-phone explicitly.
